column1: #   - OTA A/B slots at 3 MB each. Firmware fits in <1 MB today; 3 MB is
#     headroom for TFLite Micro + ML-engine code growth.
#   - Dedicated `models` partition holds Tier 0 UCF + Tier 1 TFLite bundles.
#     Per arch doc §4: model bundles updated independently of firmware revs.
#   - `sessions` partition is LittleFS-formatted by data_logger; holds raw
#     IMU + audio + label streams pending BLE upload.
